mapper.select:
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM castle_protocol t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{protocolEntity.id},'%')
AND t.code like concat('%',#{protocolEntity.code},'%')
AND t.title like concat('%',#{protocolEntity.title},'%')
AND t.content like concat('%',#{protocolEntity.content},'%')
AND t.status like concat('%',#{protocolEntity.status},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{protocolEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{protocolEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.update_user like concat('%',#{protocolEntity.updateUser},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{protocolEntity.updateTime},'%')
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{protocolEntity.isDeleted},'%')
order by create_time desc
limit #{map.offset},#{map.rows}

SELECT count(1) FROM castle_protocol t WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{protocolEntity.id},'%')
AND t.code like concat('%',#{protocolEntity.code},'%')
AND t.title like concat('%',#{protocolEntity.title},'%')
AND t.content like concat('%',#{protocolEntity.content},'%')
AND t.status like concat('%',#{protocolEntity.status},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{protocolEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{protocolEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.update_user like concat('%',#{protocolEntity.updateUser},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{protocolEntity.updateTime},'%')
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{protocolEntity.isDeleted},'%')
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM castle_protocol t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2 AND t.id = #{id}
